entities.name: V (Vrijen)
entities.context: Founder of Careerspan, managing relationship with Alan as a founder-peer rather than vendor

entities.name: Alan
entities.context: Founder-peer of V who is willing to try Careerspan and talk to Corridor X based on prior trust

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company that Alan is willing to try as part of an ongoing trusted relationship

entities.name: Corridor X
entities.context: Entity that Alan is open to speaking with, introduced or facilitated by V

entities.name: Trust capital
entities.context: Accumulated relational trust between V and Alan that V spends carefully by framing suggestions as options and experiments

entities.name: Fast timelines
entities.context: V's practice of matching urgency with same-day or next-morning linking without shifting into panic or pressure

entities.name: Founder-peer dynamic
entities.context: The relational frame between V and Alan — peers who understand each other's companies and personal situations, not a vendor-client dynamic

relationships.context: Ongoing relationship with mutual context on each other's companies and personal situations
Willing to try Careerspan based on trust in V
Open to talking to Corridor X, facilitated by V
Carefully preserves trust by framing suggestions as options and experiments rather than directives
Matches urgency with rapid action without creating pressure
Operates as a peer rather than a vendor, which is the basis of Alan's willingness to engage
